caption: ordering Pagliacci for tonight – usual or you want the veggie thing again
half and half. also did you finish the NPC dialogue for Shattered Crown? Marcus kept asking about the blacksmith last week lol
yeah done. gave him a speech impediment and a gambling debt. feels way more alive now
lmaooo you are genuinely cruel. what time is everyone on discord
7pm. if anyone bails like last session i'm retiring from DMing forever. i built that whole dungeon map.
Priya already confirmed, stop spiraling. also the Verdant Hollow build uploaded ok?
not yet, doing it before dinner. playtest's tomorrow and i'm not crashing into that like last time
pizza then build. priorities, man.
